productName: Prana Pulse AIO Disposable - Tropic Truffle Live Resin
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Tropic Truffle oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of apricot, tropical, and mango, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
